pageDescription: Configure each television step by step. Advanced settings normally do not need to be changed.
basicHelp: Set the model, network address, and REGZA Apps Connect credentials.
macHelp: Used for stable HomeKit identity and Wake on LAN.
connectionHelp: The 55J10X profile uses HTTPS on port 4430.
selfSignedHelp: Keep enabled for REGZA models using HTTPS port 4430.
powerHelp: Normally use the defaults supplied by the J10X profile.
probeIntervalMode: Periodic — Mute probe at the configured interval
muteProbeHelp: Operation-linked mode probes only at startup, then updates state from power, broadcast-input, and Mute operations.
wol: Use Wake on LAN before power ON
remoteHelp: Configure Select and arrow button behavior.
contextArrowsHelp: During viewing, Up/Down change channels and Left/Right cycle terrestrial, BS, and CS. Inside the guide they act as normal arrows.
inputsHelp: Configure the inputs shown in HomeKit and their REGZA remote codes.
advancedNote: Schema-specific options such as key-map overrides remain available through config.json.
required: Enter a name, IP address, username, and password for every TV.
